changelog.summary: Seed entry — cross-checked from 5 authoritative sources (NLM DailyMed, WHO ATC Classification, PubChem (NIH/NLM), WHO Model List of Essential Medicines (22nd List, 2021), WSAVA Global Pain Council guidelines). ATC N02AA01 + RxNorm 7052. Thai translation + faculty review pending.
